doc_title_en: Notice Concerning Cancellation of Treasury Shares (Cancellation of Treasury Shares under Companies Act Article 178)
summary_en: 160,000 ordinary shares (1.92% of shares outstanding) to be cancelled effective 29 May 2026 under Companies Act Article 178. Post-cancellation issued shares: 8,140,000.
summary_jp: 普通株式16万株（発行済株式総数比1.92%）を2026年5月29日に会社法第178条に基づき消却。消却後発行済株式総数：814万株。
tag_en: Share cancellation - 160,000 shares (1.92% S/O) - Effective 29 May 2026
tag_jp: 自己株式消却 - 16万株（発行済株式総数比1.92%）- 2026年5月29日実行

doc_title_en: Notice on Dividend Policy Change (Introduction of Progressive Dividend, etc.) and Shareholder Incentive Program Expansion

key_facts.reason_jp: 財務状況と今後の事業展開を勘案し、株主への利益還元充実

summary_en: Dividend policy amended effective FY3/27 to adopt progressive dividend with minimum payout ratio 50%, maintaining or increasing dividends in principle. Shareholder incentive program expanded to include holders of 100+ shares.
summary_jp: FY3/27より配当方針を変更し累進配当を採用、配当性向50%以上を維持。株主優待制度は100株以上に拡充。
tag_en: Dividend policy - Progressive dividend adoption - Payout ratio 50%+ - FY3/27 implementation
tag_jp: 配当方針変更 - 累進配当導入 - 配当性向50%以上 - FY3/27適用
